name: firmable-landing-blocks
description: Custom Gutenberg blocks for the Firmable landing page

scripts.build: wp-scripts build src/hero/index.js src/logos/index.js src/features/index.js src/testimonials/index.js src/cta/index.js --output-path=build
scripts.start: wp-scripts start src/hero/index.js src/logos/index.js src/features/index.js src/testimonials/index.js src/cta/index.js --output-path=build
